description.p: Nautune is a feature-rich music player for Jellyfin media servers. Stream your personal music library with a polished, cross-platform experience featuring adaptive colors, lyrics, waveform visualizers, gapless playback, and collaborative listening via Fleet Mode.

ul.li: Gapless and crossfade playback with ReplayGain support
Adaptive UI colors extracted from album artwork
Synchronized lyrics with automatic fetching
Fleet Mode: synchronized playback across devices
Helm Mode: remote control other Nautune instances
Offline downloads for listening without a connection
Smart Mix, Instant Mix, and listening analytics
Waveform and FFT audio visualizers
ListenBrainz scrobbling

screenshot.caption: Nautune library and player on Linux

description.p: v7.7.0: Deep Quality Audit — Bug Fixes, Performance Hardening & Code Architecture

ul.li: Fix: Library screen reactivity restored — albums/artists now load immediately
Fix: Alphabet scrollbar accuracy — correct aspect ratio and padding alignment
Fix: Offline artist albums now match by ID instead of display name
Fix: Connectivity stream no longer dies silently on Linux network interface changes
Fix: SyncPlay playback rate resets properly after session cleanup
Performance: Cached network images for palette extraction, single StreamBuilder in now playing bar
Performance: Cached luminance computation, guarded LyricsService initialization
Fix: Offline repository activates when network drops, not just on manual toggle
Fix: Download progress shows indeterminate when server omits Content-Length
Replaced hardcoded colors with theme system throughout
Split library_screen.dart (6030 lines) into modular architecture (8 focused files)

description.p: v6.7.2: Stats, Discovery & Lock Screen Fixes

ul.li: Fix: Profile stats infinite loading spinner (added timeout and guaranteed loading state reset)
Fix: Total listening hours no longer inflated (uses actual listening time instead of track duration x play count)
Fix: Top artists now include all played tracks, not just top 1000
Fix: ListenBrainz "Discover New Music" no longer shows tracks already in your library
Fix: Lock screen controls no longer greyed out after pausing in-app
Fix: Infinite Radio now continues playing after album ends (race condition, duplicate filtering, and UI notification fixes)
Fix: Skip-to-next at end of queue now triggers Infinite Radio fetch

description.p: v6.7.0: Helm Mode, Fleet Mode, Bug Fixes, Flatpak

ul.li: Helm Mode: Remote control other Nautune instances via Jellyfin Sessions API
Fleet Mode: Rebranded SyncPlay with tighter drift correction, sync quality indicator, and shuffle/repeat controls
Fix: CarPlay browsing no longer breaks after navigating back (root cause fix)
Fix: iOS lock screen play/pause button no longer grays out when paused
Flatpak packaging for Linux distribution

description.p: v6.6.0: Artist Tracks, Adaptive Colors, iOS Lock Screen Fix, Smart Mix Expansion
